Liverpool rule out Simon Mignolet loan deal as Reds make transfer decision on goalkeeper

Liverpool remain highly unlikely to sell Simon Mignolet and have no plans to send the goalkeeper on loan before the transfer window closes.

https://www.liverpoolecho.co.uk/sport/football/transfer-news/liverpool-transfer-latest-simon-mignolet-16598728

Here’s an overview of another day of Liverpool transfer rumours.

HERBIE KANE:
• Kane looks set for a loan move to the Championship with Hull City, Brentford and Charlton Athletic all reportedly interested.
• The midfielder impressed on loan at Doncaster Rovers last season but Football League World are reporting a return to the League One side has been ruled out.

DANIEL STURRIDGE:
• Sturridge is reportedly being considered by Inter Milan following his release from Liverpool, according to Marca.
• Serie A could potentially be a very good move for the former Reds forward. Not sure what makes the Spanish press clued up on Inter’s transfer activity though.

SIMON MIGNOLET:
• Simon Mignolet still wants to leave Liverpool this summer according to his agent.
• Jürgen Klopp is keen for the Belgian to stay at Anfield, and was confident the shot-stopper would stay put when asked about his future after his side’s win over Bradford City.
• But his agent told Belgian publication Les Sports Plus that he’s still working on a exit for the player, saying: “It’s important for Simon to play somewhere, and our goal is still to make him leave.” LIAM MILLAR:
• Liam Millar could be set for a loan return to Kilmarnock according to Football Scotland, with Liverpool wanting the Canada international to be playing senior football next season.

NICOLAS PEPE:
• According to La Voix Du Nord, Liverpool have opened talks to sign Pepe.
• This rumour won’t go away. Liverpool are categorically not interested despite these persistent reports.

HAKIM ZIYECH:
• According to club sources, Liverpool today have brought Hakim Ziyech back on the shortlist for summer targets.
• They were also informed by officials in Holland that Manchester United have been talking to the player, who wants £150k a week.
• Very doubtful this will happen. The Reds are unlikely to make any big money moves this summer, and this would be just that. 🔴 #LFC

高普再三重申今夏轉會窗唔會有大買賣發生。

「保持輕鬆，靜待事態發展。我之前都講過今個轉會窗唔會係咩大手交易嘅一次。過去兩年增兵上已經用咗好多錢，我地唔會年年咁樣洗腳唔抹腳式燒銀紙。」

「成日都聽人話：『今季花兩、三億鎊買人吧！』，事實上云云球壇可能得幾隊波好似巴塞、皇馬、巴黎及曼城可以年年咁做。」

「但無問題，我對球隊陣容感到滿意，真係好滿意，可能個別位置再諗諗補強，但真係唔急、無壓力要急住求其簽個人，我地對每個情況都會有解決辦法。」

「有無一個方案可以令所有人都開心？我認為未必有，人人都想有世界級球員加盟，正選要世界級，後備要世界級，實情係好難嘅，當然我地努力一手一腳建立緊。」

「陣容瘦身方面同樣唔急，年輕球員享受一齊操練嘅機會，唔好忘記基達及沙基利仲養緊傷，佢地返晒黎之後我地陣容其實好強大。」

「我對新球季充滿期待，可能預期會係一個刺激嘅一季。」

【Now Sports-體育】利物浦領隊高普承認曼城又會是新一季英超的爭霸大熱門，但紅軍只會聚焦自己。

正帶領利物浦進行美國之旅的高普，將於周五揮軍在印第安納鬥其前執教球隊多蒙特，被問到新一季的英超爭標大勢時，他說：「我完全聚焦於利物浦。如果我們能夠再次與曼城並肩就很好，顯然他們又會是（爭標）熱門，沒有問題。」

去季紅軍僅以1分之差被曼城所壓，高普認為競爭推動雙方進步：「我不認為若沒有我們，曼城去季可以得到98分，而若沒有他們，己隊不會得到97分。」不過他強調在新一季，其他強隊也有力逐鹿中原：「所有球隊都會重新開始，並不是曼城與利物浦的對決，列強也虎視眈眈。」

「眼前要做的工作多的是，那是我們所需要集中的事，並不是如何打敗曼城。」他續說。

去季紅軍僅以1分之差被曼城所壓，高普認為競爭推動雙方進步：「我不認為若沒有我們，曼城去季可以得到98分，而若沒有他們，己隊不會得到97分。」不過他強調在新一季，其他強隊也有力逐鹿中原：「所有球隊都會重新開始，並不是曼城與利物浦的對決，列強也虎視眈眈。」

「眼前要做的工作多的是，那是我們所需要集中的事，並不是如何打敗曼城。」他續說。
